data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Adobe implements a zero trust framework to protect its network and systems against breaches.
data.technical_spec: Continuous verification of user identity, multi-factor authentication, monitoring of device health.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent auditing of systems to identify and remedy potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party security assessments and penetration testing performed regularly.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit to protect user information and company data.
data.technical_spec: Use of protocols such as TLS for data in transit and AES for data at rest.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: A detailed response plan to quickly handle any detected security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Automated threat detection tools, predefined protocols for data breach responses.

data.title: Employee Training Programs
data.description: Regular security training to ensure employees follow best practices.
data.technical_spec: Training modules, phishing simulations, and workshops for staying updated on security practices.
